reason: Title signals entitlement-defense posture, but lacks summary—classic setup for riders or reconciliation payloads. 'Protecting' language often masks benefit-formula changes, COLA suspensions, or means-testing carve-outs that shift costs to lower-income tranches while preserving high-earner thresholds.
vectors: COLA or COL adjustment mechanics exploit
Fiscal bleed disguised as solvency measure
title: Protecting and Preserving Social Security Act
